q: Who can I book on Ohlify?
a: Verified professionals across healthcare, law, finance, coaching, design, engineering, and more. Every professional completes a KYC check — identity, credentials, and a video selfie — before they can take their first booking.

q: How much does a call cost?
a: Each professional sets their own rate per call type and duration. You see the price up-front before you confirm a booking. No surprise add-ons; no subscriptions.

q: What happens if my professional doesn't show up?
a: You're refunded automatically. Our system tracks join states for both parties — if the professional hasn't joined within the grace window, the booking is voided, your money returns to your wallet, and the professional receives a strike on their record.
Payments are processed by Paystack and held in an escrow ledger that follows double-entry accounting. We never store your card details. Refunds happen automatically over the same channel.
Yes. Cancel outside the cancellation window for a full refund. Inside the window, a small penalty may apply — the exact rules sit on each professional's profile.
When a call ends successfully, the professional's share lands in their in-app wallet. They withdraw to their verified bank account and we settle within minutes.
We're starting in Nigeria with Nigerian payment rails, but the product is built for global use. New countries roll out as we onboard payment partners.

q: How do I become a professional on Ohlify?
a: Tap "Earn on Ohlify" anywhere on the site. You'll complete a short KYC (ID, bank account, role, rates) and our review team usually approves within 24 hours.
